profile.name: Bhushan Patil
profile.subtitle: Software Developer | B.E. Computer Engineering, Class of 2027
profile.bio: B.E. Computer Engineering student at Mumbai University. Full-stack developer building end-to-end web applications with React, Node.js, Express, and REST APIs, backed by MongoDB and MySQL. Strong in modern JavaScript, authentication, and performance optimizations. Practicing Data Structures & Algorithms in C++ and seeking an SDE internship / entry-level role.
goals: Secure an SDE internship / entry-level developer role
Master advanced Data Structures & Algorithms in C++
Scale web applications with React and Redux Toolkit
Optimize web performance with code splitting, caching, and lazy loading

projects.title: YouTube Clone
projects.description: Video streaming platform built on the YouTube Data API v3. Features debounced search, result caching, infinite scrolling, category browsing, and a recursive comment system.

projects.title: NetflixGPT
projects.description: AI-powered movie recommendation platform calling the OpenAI GPT-3.5 API and TMDB search. Features Firebase Authentication with protected routes and multilingual UI support.

projects.title: Food Ordering Platform
projects.description: Swiggy-inspired single-page application with centralized cart state, custom hooks, lazy routing, restaurant REST API integration, and shimmer loading states.

achievements.title: Namaste React
achievements.description: Completed Namaste React campaign, building production-grade projects like Swiggy Food Ordering SPA.

achievements.title: Namaste JavaScript
achievements.description: Mastered high-performance JavaScript fundamentals, asynchronous runtimes, scopes, closures, and engines.

achievements.title: Java Programming
achievements.description: Acquired comprehensive training in Java, OOP design, and core backend data structures.

achievements.title: LeetCode Profile
achievements.description: Solving Data Structures and Algorithms problems in C++ on LeetCode.

timeline.description: Enrolled in B.E. Computer Engineering at Mumbai University. Grinding C programming, fundamentals, and logic building.
Unlocked OOP, Java Programming, and database systems (MySQL). Started practicing coding challenges.
Completed Namaste React & JS courses. Shipped the food ordering SPA capstone project on Cloudflare Pages.
Shipped high-performance AI recommenders (OpenAI GPT-3.5 API) and Video Streaming clones utilizing Redux Toolkit.
Goal: Graduate from college with B.E. degree and land an SDE internship / entry-level role.
